title: Sweet, Shattering, Energizing Egyptian Anchovies Confit
description: A sweet and savory dish that combines flavors of Egypt with the umami of meyeolchi-anchovies. This confit-style recipe is perfect for a quick and energizing meal.
instructions: In a small saucepan, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat.
Add 1 small onion, finely chopped, and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add 2 cloves of garlic, minced, and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add 250g of confit tomatoes, 1 teaspoon of ground cumin, and 1 teaspoon of smoked paprika. Stir to combine.
